text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I kinda want to do a freestyle race again. There's
nothing like that feeling of freedom!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
You go barreling down that weird course with
nothing else on your mind, and the second you
finish, you pass the heck out!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Although, the other day I wasn't thinking and
spread out my handkerchief before sitting down,
and they all gave me crap for being a "princess"
or whatever...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
But you know, talking about it is making me want
to go see them again! Wonder when I'll get the
chance...
